name: skill-compass
tagline: ClawHub (124★): Evaluate skill quality, find the weakest dimension, and apply directed improvements. Also tracks usage to spot idle or risk
verdict: Solid structure and security. The concerning part: it edits the user's global ~/.claude/settings.json, a system-wide side effect never disclosed in its own description, so it can surprise users with changes they didn't expect. Also lacks a 'not for' boundary and any fallback if package.json read fails.
